name: bandit.extortion_reopened_demand_mcw
description: Bandit shakedown/toll-control regression: resume the McWilliams/Basecamp local-contact fixture with defender-loss reopen fields set, then prove the higher reopened demand still shows bounded pay/fight options for the bandit camp profile.
artifact_patterns: renegotiation reopen: previous defender loss raises this one bounded demand

steps.label: post_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the reopened McWilliams bandit shakedown fixture; this is startup/load footing only

steps.label: advance_299_turns_to_gate_edge
steps.expected_immediate_state: bounded turn advance reaches the reopened shakedown gate edge; proof is deferred to the same-run reopened demand artifact after the final turn

steps.label: advance_final_turn_to_reopened_shakedown
steps.expected_visible_fact: reopened Bandit shakedown dialogue window is visible with the reopened-demand opening and player-facing pay/fight/refuse choices after the final local-contact turn

steps.label: audit_reopened_demand_surface_artifact
required_line_patterns: renegotiation reopen: previous defender loss raises this one bounded demand
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove the reopened bandit camp-style demand surface, bounded higher toll, and pay/fight options
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names camp_style profile, open_shakedown posture, reopened higher demanded toll, and both pay/fight options

evidence_contract.claim: a prior defender-loss reopen produces one bounded higher bandit shakedown demand while keeping the player-visible pay/fight surface
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for reopened shakedown behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No reopened-demand credit unless startup/load, visible demand surface, same-run camp_style/open_shakedown artifact, bounded higher demanded toll, and reopen note are all green/matched.
